sentence.english: You are much taller than last year.

sentence.traditional: 媽媽每天都會煮很多好吃的菜，這就是跟她一起住的好處。
sentence.pinyin: Māma měitiān dōu huì zhǔ hěn duō hǎochī de cài, zhè jiù shì gēn tā yìqǐ zhù de hǎochu.
sentence.english: Mother makes a lot of delicious food every day, this is an advantage of living with her.

sentence.traditional: 如果你有什麼問題，請隨時聯繫我。

sentence.english: If you have any problems, please contact me at any time.

sentence.traditional: 請問您貴姓？
sentence.pinyin: Qǐngwèn nín guìxìng?
sentence.english: May I ask your surname?

sentence.traditional: 報名時需要填寫真實姓名。

sentence.english: When registering, you need to fill in your real name.

sentence.traditional: 我桌子上放著一本很厚的字典。

sentence.english: There is a very thick dictionary on my desk.

sentence.traditional: 下學期我們開始學習法語了。

sentence.traditional: 那張椅子真的很漂亮，很想把它買下。
sentence.pinyin: Nà zhāng yǐzi zhēn de hěn piàoliang, hěn xiǎng bǎ tā mǎi xià.
sentence.english: This chair is truly beautiful, I really want to buy it.

sentence.simplified: 这些书我都看过了，它们很好看。
sentence.traditional: 這些書我都看過了，它們很好看。
sentence.pinyin: Zhèxiē shū wǒ dōu kànguò le, tāmen hěn hǎokàn.
sentence.english: I have read all these books; they are very good.

sentence.traditional: 這裡很安全，你放心吧。

sentence.english: It is very safe here, don't worry.

sentence.traditional: 請大家安靜一下，老師要說話了。

sentence.traditional: 作業還沒做完，你先別看電視。

sentence.english: The homework is not finished yet, don't watch TV first.

sentence.traditional: 我完全不懂。

sentence.english: I don't understand at all.

sentence.traditional: 請在明天以前完成這個工作。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng zài míngtiān yǐqián wánchéng zhège gōngzuò.
sentence.english: Please finish this work before tomorrow.

sentence.simplified: 顾客服务员最怕就是遇到麻烦的客人。
sentence.traditional: 顧客服務員最怕就是遇到麻煩的客人。

sentence.english: Customer service staff is most worried about encountering annoying customers.

sentence.simplified: 家庭对我来说十分重要。
sentence.traditional: 家庭對我來說十分重要。

sentence.english: Family is very important to me.

definitions: parent or guardian of a child

sentence.simplified: 很多家长都很关心孩子的学习。
sentence.traditional: 很多家長都很關心孩子的學習。
sentence.pinyin: Hěn duō jiāzhǎng dōu hěn guānxīn háizi de xuéxí.
sentence.english: Many parents care a lot about their children’s studies.

sentence.traditional: 我實在太累了，想早點回家。

sentence.english: I’m really too tired and want to go home early.

sentence.traditional: 我終於實現了自己的夢想。

sentence.traditional: 那個新來的實習生做事很認真。

sentence.traditional: 你要看看實際情況再決定。

sentence.english: You need to look at the real situation before deciding.

definitions: classifier for sealed objects, esp. letters

sentence.traditional: 請把這個盒子封好再寄出去。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhège hézi fēnghǎo zài jì chūqù.

sentence.traditional: 請聽下面的對話，然後回答問題。

sentence.english: Please listen to the following dialogue, then answer the questions.

sentence.traditional: 我家對面有一家很大的超市。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ jiā duìmiàn yǒu yì jiā hěn dà de chāoshì.
sentence.english: There is a big supermarket across from my home.

sentence.traditional: 下雨天要小心地滑。

sentence.english: Be careful not to slip on rainy days.

sentence.traditional: 你小時候最好的朋友是誰？

sentence.english: Who was your best friend when you were little?

sentence.traditional: 上課的時候，他總是小聲問我問題。

sentence.english: I recommend you read this novel.

sentence.traditional: 這本書講了一個勇敢少年的故事。

sentence.english: This book tells the story of a brave young boy.

sentence.traditional: 少數人不喜歡喝茶，更喜歡喝咖啡。

sentence.english: Your son is about the same age as my son.

sentence.traditional: 市長說要讓城市更乾淨。

sentence.english: I only brought my phone.

sentence.traditional: 這個好消息帶來了新的希望。

sentence.english: This good news has brought new hope.

sentence.traditional: 手機是我們常用的工具。

sentence.english: A mobile phone is a tool we often use.

definitions: see also 平聲|平声[ping2 sheng1]

sentence.traditional: 請保持聲音平穩。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng bǎochí shēngyīn píngwěn.

sentence.traditional: 她平常喜歡穿得很樸素。

sentence.english: Treating everyone equally is fair.

sentence.traditional: 她每天都很努力地幹活兒，從不懈怠。

sentence.simplified: 这家饭店的服务态度很好。

definitions: classifier for buildings, mountains and similar immovable objects

sentence.traditional: 這座學校在城市中心。

sentence.english: This school is in the center of the city.

sentence.traditional: 電影院裡的第一排座位已經滿了。

sentence.traditional: 這家電影院每天都有新影片。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā diànyǐngyuàn měitiān dōu yǒu xīn yǐngpiàn.

sentence.simplified: 受他爸爸的影响，他做事很认真。
sentence.traditional: 受他爸爸的影響，他做事很認真。
sentence.pinyin: Shòu tā bàba de yǐngxiǎng, tā zuòshì hěn rènzhēn.
sentence.english: Under the influence of his father, he works very hard.

sentence.traditional: 我不想再談往事了。

sentence.english: I don't want to talk about the past.

sentence.simplified: 我小时候不喜欢学习，后来慢慢喜欢了。
sentence.traditional: 我小時候不喜歡學習，後來慢慢喜歡了。

sentence.english: You write very well; it is very clear to read.

definitions: structural particle: used after a verb (or adjective as main verb), linking it to following phrase indicating effect, degree, possibility etc

sentence.traditional: 你今天得早點回家。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān děi zǎodiǎn huíjiā.
sentence.english: You have to go home early today.

sentence.simplified: 我们从小就是邻居，一直玩得很好。
sentence.traditional: 我們從小就是鄰居，一直玩得很好。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen cóngxiǎo jiùshì línjū, yìzhí wán de hěn hǎo.
sentence.english: We have been neighbors since childhood and always played together very well.

sentence.simplified: 我有时候会跟同学一起在学校复习。
sentence.traditional: 我有時候會跟同學一起在學校複習。

sentence.traditional: 這個決定我必須要認真考慮一下。

sentence.english: I must seriously consider this decision.

sentence.traditional: 你快樂嗎？

sentence.english: Are you happy?

sentence.simplified: 他快要到家了，你再等等。
sentence.traditional: 他快要到家了，你再等等。

sentence.english: He is about to get home; wait a bit more.

sentence.traditional: 中午我們去學校旁邊吃快餐。

sentence.simplified: 天冷了，你快点儿回家吧。
sentence.traditional: 天冷了，你快點兒回家吧。

sentence.english: It’s cold, you should go home quickly.

sentence.traditional: 忽然間，他們聽到了一聲巨響。
sentence.pinyin: hūrán jiān, tāmen tīng dào le yī shēng jùxiǎng.

sentence.traditional: 天氣這麼冷，我們怎樣去公園呢？

sentence.simplified: 别着急，我们还有时间。
sentence.traditional: 別著急，我們還有時間。
sentence.pinyin: Bié zháojí, wǒmen hái yǒu shíjiān.
sentence.english: Don't worry, we still have time.

sentence.simplified: 一想到明天要考试，我就很紧张。
sentence.traditional: 一想到明天要考試，我就很緊張。
sentence.pinyin: Yì xiǎngdào míngtiān yào kǎoshì, wǒ jiù hěn jǐnzhāng.
sentence.english: As soon as I think about the exam tomorrow, I get very nervous.

definitions: to think of a way (to do sth)

sentence.simplified: 我同意你的想法，我也觉得坐地铁去机场更快。
sentence.traditional: 我同意你的想法，我也覺得坐地鐵去機場更快。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ tóngyì nǐde xiǎngfǎ, wǒ yě juéde zuò dìtiě qù jīchǎng gèng kuài.
sentence.english: I agree with your opinion; I also think riding the subway to the airport is faster.

sentence.simplified: 我想不起他的名字了。
sentence.traditional: 我想不起他的名字了。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎngbuqǐ tā de míngzi le.
sentence.english: I can’t remember his name.

definitions: to give as a small token
to do sth as a gesture of goodwill etc

sentence.simplified: 这个故事很有意思。
sentence.traditional: 這個故事很有意思。
sentence.pinyin: Zhège gùshi hěn yǒuyìsi.
sentence.english: This story is very interesting.

sentence.simplified: 我们虽然意见不同，但是还是好朋友。
sentence.traditional: 我們雖然意見不同，但是還是好朋友。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen suīrán yìjiàn bùtóng, dànshì háishi hǎo péngyou.
sentence.english: Although we have different opinions, we are still good friends.

sentence.simplified: 我不相信爱情。
sentence.traditional: 我不相信愛情。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ bù xiāngxìn àiqíng.
sentence.english: I don't believe in love.

sentence.simplified: 今天工作很多，他感到有点累。
sentence.traditional: 今天工作很多，他感到有點累。
sentence.pinyin: Jīntiān gōngzuò hěn duō, tā gǎndào yǒudiǎn lèi.
sentence.english: There is a lot of work today, and he feels a bit tired.

sentence.simplified: 我觉得很感动。
sentence.traditional: 我覺得很感動。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ juéde hěn gǎndòng.
sentence.english: I feel very touched.

sentence.simplified: 你感觉怎么样？
sentence.traditional: 你感覺怎麼樣？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ gǎnjué zěnmeyàng?
sentence.english: How do you feel?

sentence.simplified: 感谢大家今天来参加我的生日会。
sentence.traditional: 感謝大家今天來參加我的生日會。
sentence.pinyin: Gǎnxiè dàjiā jīntiān lái cānjiā wǒ de shēngrìhuì.
sentence.english: Thank you all for coming to my birthday party today.

sentence.simplified: 请注意一下你的态度！
sentence.traditional: 請注意一下你的態度！
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng zhùyì yíxià nǐ de tàidu!
sentence.english: Please pay attention to your attitude!

sentence.simplified: 我懂说一点普通话。
sentence.traditional: 我懂說一點普通話。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ dǒng shuō yìdiǎn Pǔtōnghuà.
sentence.english: I know how to speak a little Mandarin.

sentence.simplified: 懂得说“谢谢”和“对不起”很重要。
sentence.traditional: 懂得說「謝謝」和「對不起」很重要。
sentence.pinyin: Dǒngde shuō “xièxie” hé “duìbuqǐ” hěn zhòngyào.
sentence.english: Knowing how to say “thank you” and “sorry” is very important.

sentence.simplified: 明天他应该也会去。
sentence.traditional: 明天他應該也會去。
sentence.pinyin: Míngtiān tā yīnggāi yě huì qù.
sentence.english: Tomorrow he should also be able to go.

sentence.simplified: 他说要学好汉语，一定能成。
sentence.traditional: 他說要學好漢語，一定能成。
sentence.pinyin: Tā shuō yào xuéhǎo Hànyǔ, yídìng néng chéng.
sentence.english: He said he wants to learn Chinese well and he can definitely succeed.

sentence.simplified: 我长大后想成为一名医生。
sentence.traditional: 我長大後想成為一名醫生。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ zhǎngdà hòu xiǎng chéngwéi yì míng yīshēng.
sentence.english: After I grow up I want to become a doctor.

sentence.simplified: 今年公司的业务取得不错的成绩。
sentence.traditional: 今年公司的業務取得不錯的成績。
sentence.pinyin: Jīnnián gōngsī de yèwù qǔdé búcuò de chéngjì.
sentence.english: The company's business performed well this year.

sentence.simplified: 你可以先写作业，或先吃饭，都可以。
sentence.traditional: 你可以先寫作業，或先吃飯，都可以。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xiān xiě zuòyè, huò xiān chīfàn, dōu kěyǐ.
sentence.english: You can do your homework first or eat first, both are fine.

sentence.simplified: 我们也不知道什么时候会有货，或者你下星期再来看看吧。
sentence.traditional: 我們也不知道什麼時候會有貨，或者你下星期再來看看吧。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen yě bù zhīdào shénme shíhou huì yǒu huò, huòzhě nǐ xià xīngqī zài lái kànkan ba.
sentence.english: We don't know when it will be available, perhaps you can come back next week to take a look.

sentence.simplified: 天气很冷，所以请多穿一点衣服。
sentence.traditional: 天氣很冷，所以請多穿一點衣服。
sentence.pinyin: Tiānqì hěn lěng, suǒyǐ qǐng duō chuān yìdiǎn yīfu.
sentence.english: The weather is very cold, so please wear more clothes.

sentence.simplified: 所有人都必须遵守法律。
sentence.traditional: 所有人都必須遵守法律。
sentence.pinyin: Suǒyǒu rén dōu bìxū zūnshǒu fǎlǜ.
sentence.english: All people should respect the laws.

sentence.simplified: 他整天在看我的手表。
sentence.traditional: 他整天在看我的手錶。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zhěngtiān zài kàn wǒ de shǒubiǎo.
sentence.english: He was looking at my watch all day.

sentence.simplified: 请问你们有打印服务吗？
sentence.traditional: 請問你們有打印服務嗎？
sentence.pinyin: Qǐngwèn nǐmen yǒu dǎyìn fúwù ma?
sentence.english: Excuse me, do you have printing service?

definitions: to work a temporary or casual job
(of students) to have a job outside of class time, or during vacation

sentence.simplified: 大学生们常常在假期找打工的机会。
sentence.traditional: 大學生們常常在假期找打工的機會。
sentence.pinyin: Dàxuéshēng men chángcháng zài jiàqī zhǎo dǎgōng de jīhuì.
sentence.english: College students often look for job opportunities during holidays.

sentence.simplified: 我打算明年去北京旅游。
sentence.traditional: 我打算明年去北京旅遊。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ dǎsuàn míngnián qù Běijīng lǚyóu.
sentence.english: I plan to travel to Beijing next year.

sentence.simplified: 老师让我们找出句子里的错误。
sentence.traditional: 老師讓我們找出句子裡的錯誤。
sentence.pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen zhǎochū jùzi lǐ de cuòwù.
sentence.english: The teacher asked us to find the mistakes in the sentence.

sentence.simplified: 我差一点掉进水里了，幸好你把我拉回来。
sentence.traditional: 我差一點掉進水里了，幸好你把我拉回來。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ chà yìdiǎn diào jìn shuǐ lǐ le, xìnghǎo nǐ bǎ wǒ lāhuílái.
sentence.english: I almost fell into the water, luckily you pulled me back.

sentence.simplified: 你可以拿出手机给我看看吗？
sentence.traditional: 你可以拿出手機給我看看嗎？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ ná chū shǒujī gěi wǒ kànkan ma?
sentence.english: Can you take out your phone and let me have a look?

definitions: to stick out (a part of the body)

sentence.simplified: 我挺你！
sentence.traditional: 我挺你！
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ tǐng nǐ!
sentence.english: I support you!

sentence.simplified: 这儿的咖啡味道挺好，你可以试试。
sentence.traditional: 這兒的咖啡味道挺好，你可以試試。
sentence.pinyin: Zhèr de kāfēi wèidào tǐng hǎo, nǐ kěyǐ shìshi.
sentence.english: The coffee here tastes quite good; you can give it a try.

definitions: (used after certain verbs to express completion, fulfillment, removal etc)

sentence.simplified: 你的手机掉在地上了。
sentence.traditional: 你的手機掉在地上了。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ de shǒujī diào zài dìshàng le.
sentence.english: Your phone fell on the ground.

sentence.simplified: 电影院门口排了很长的队。
sentence.traditional: 電影院門口排了很長的隊。
sentence.pinyin: Diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu pái le hěn cháng de duì.
sentence.english: There is a very long line at the cinema entrance.

sentence.simplified: 你更喜欢打篮球还是打排球？
sentence.traditional: 你更喜歡打籃球還是打排球？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ gèng xǐhuān dǎ lánqiú háishì dǎ páiqiú?
sentence.english: Do you like playing basketball or volleyball more?

sentence.simplified: 上车要先排队，不要挤。
sentence.traditional: 上車要先排隊，不要擠。
sentence.pinyin: Shàngchē yào xiān páiduì, búyào jǐ.
sentence.english: You should line up before getting on the bus; don't push.

definitions: to take one's turn on duty

sentence.simplified: 好久没有接到你的电话了！
sentence.traditional: 好久沒有接到你的電話了！
sentence.pinyin: Hǎojiǔ méiyǒu jiēdào nǐde diànhuà le!
sentence.english: It’s been a long time since I last got a call from you!

sentence.simplified: 接下来你打算做什么？
sentence.traditional: 接下來你打算做什麼？
sentence.pinyin: Jiēxiàlái nǐ dǎsuàn zuò shénme?

sentence.simplified: 很多同学都接到了老师的邀请。
sentence.traditional: 很多同學都接到了老師的邀請。

sentence.english: Many students received the teacher's invitation.

sentence.simplified: 我知道这个工作机会非常好，我希望你可以接受这个工作。
sentence.traditional: 我知道這個工作機會非常好，我希望你可以接受這個工作。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ zhīdào zhè gè gōngzuò jīhuì fēicháng hǎo, wǒ xīwàng nǐ kěyǐ jiēshòu zhè gè gōngzuò.
sentence.english: I know this is a great job opportunity; I hope that you can accept it.

definitions: to go on to do sth

sentence.simplified: 他坐在沙发上看电视，接着就睡着了。
sentence.traditional: 他坐在沙發上看電視，接著就睡著了。

sentence.english: He sat on the couch to watch TV, then fell asleep.

sentence.simplified: 请不要推别人。
sentence.traditional: 請不要推別人。

sentence.english: Please don't push other people.

definitions: to carry (hanging down from the hand)

sentence.simplified: 他一只手提着一个大箱子。
sentence.traditional: 他一隻手提著一個大箱子。
sentence.pinyin: Tā yì zhī shǒu tízhe yí gè dà xiāngzi.
sentence.english: He is carrying a big suitcase in one hand.

sentence.simplified: 我想向老师提出一个小要求。
sentence.traditional: 我想向老師提出一個小要求。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiàng lǎoshī tíchū yí gè xiǎo yāoqiú.
sentence.english: I want to make a small request to the teacher.

sentence.simplified: 在信里，他还提到最近找到新工作的事。
sentence.traditional: 在信裡，他還提到最近找到新工作的事。

sentence.traditional: 這個視頻對他們提高聽力有好處。

sentence.simplified: 我明天去把钱兑换吧。
sentence.traditional: 我明天去把錢兌換吧。

sentence.english: I'm going to exchange money tomorrow.

definitions: in care of (used on address line after name)

sentence.simplified: 妈妈在收衣服，你去帮帮她。
sentence.traditional: 媽媽在收衣服，你去幫幫她。
sentence.pinyin: Māma zài shōu yīfu, nǐ qù bāngbang tā.
sentence.english: Mom is taking in the clothes; go and help her.

sentence.simplified: 他的收入不高，但是生活很开心。
sentence.traditional: 他的收入不高，但是生活很開心。

sentence.english: His income is not high, but his life is very happy.

sentence.simplified: 你收到我的短信了吗？
sentence.traditional: 你收到我的短信了嗎？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ shōudào wǒ de duǎnxìn le ma?
sentence.english: Did you receive my text message?

sentence.simplified: 我想改一下计划，明天再出发。
sentence.traditional: 我想改一下計劃，明天再出發。

sentence.simplified: 这本书改变了我对爱情的想法。
sentence.traditional: 這本書改變了我對愛情的想法。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè běn shū gǎibiàn le wǒ duì àiqíng de xiǎngfǎ.
sentence.english: This book changed the way I think about love.

sentence.simplified: 请把手机放下，我们好好说话。
sentence.traditional: 請把手機放下，我們好好說話。

sentence.simplified: 放心吧我们一定会找到新工作。
sentence.traditional: 放心吧我們一定會找到新工作。
sentence.pinyin: Fàngxīn ba wǒmen yídìng huì zhǎodào xīn gōngzuò.
sentence.english: Don't worry, we'll definitely find new jobs.

sentence.simplified: 这事情只会发生在童话故事里吧。
sentence.traditional: 這事情只會發生在童話故事裡吧。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè shìqing zhǐ huì fāshēng zài tónghuà gùshi lǐ ba.
sentence.english: This type of thing only happens in fairy tales.

sentence.simplified: 他不是故意的，你别生气。
sentence.traditional: 他不是故意的，你別生氣。
sentence.pinyin: Tā bú shì gùyì de, nǐ bié shēngqì.
sentence.english: He didn't do it on purpose, don't be angry.

sentence.simplified: 我们学校有很多教学活动。
sentence.traditional: 我們學校有很多教學活動。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu hěn duō jiàoxué huódòng.
sentence.english: Our school has many teaching activities.

sentence.simplified: 下雨的时候，学生们在教室里做作业。
sentence.traditional: 下雨的時候，學生們在教室裡做作業。
sentence.pinyin: Xiàyǔ de shíhou, xuéshengmen zài jiàoshì lǐ zuò zuòyè.
sentence.english: When it rains, the students do their homework in the classroom.

sentence.simplified: 我想以后当一名汉语教师。
sentence.traditional: 我想以後當一名漢語教師。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng yǐhòu dāng yì míng Hànyǔ jiàoshī.
sentence.english: I want to be a Chinese teacher in the future.

sentence.simplified: 现今网上教育越来越普遍。
sentence.traditional: 現今網上教育越來越普遍。
sentence.pinyin: Xiànjīn wǎngshàng jiàoyù yuèláiyuè pǔbiàn.
sentence.english: These days, online learning is more and more common.

sentence.simplified: 这本书的页数很多。
sentence.traditional: 這本書的頁數很多。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè běn shū de yèshù hěn duō.
sentence.english: This book has many pages.

sentence.simplified: 密码一定要有最少六个数字。
sentence.traditional: 密碼一定要有最少六個數字。
sentence.pinyin: Mìmǎ yídìng yào yǒu zuìshǎo liù gè shùzì.
sentence.english: Passwords must have 6 digits at minimum.

sentence.simplified: 这块肉有一斤多，够我们吃了。
sentence.traditional: 這塊肉有一斤多，夠我們吃了。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè kuài ròu yǒu yì jīn duō, gòu wǒmen chī le.
sentence.english: This piece of meat is more than one jin; it's enough for us to eat.

sentence.traditional: 新聞報導也說這個產品對身體有害。

sentence.english: The news report said this product is harmful to your body.

sentence.simplified: 我开会的时候不方便接电话。
sentence.traditional: 我開會的時候不方便接電話。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ kāihuì de shíhou bù fāngbiàn jiē diànhuà.
sentence.english: It isn't convenient for me to answer the phone during a meeting.

sentence.simplified: 我今天太忙了，中午只吃了一碗方便面。
sentence.traditional: 我今天太忙了，中午只吃了一碗方便麵。

sentence.english: I was too busy today and only had a bowl of instant noodles at noon.

sentence.simplified: 跟着这个方向一直走就到了。
sentence.traditional: 跟著這個方向一直走就到了。
sentence.pinyin: Gēnzhe zhège fāngxiàng yìzhí zǒu jiù dào le.
sentence.english: Keep walking in this direction and you will arrive.

sentence.simplified: 你有没有更好的方法解决这个问题？
sentence.traditional: 你有沒有更好的方法解決這個問題？

sentence.english: Do you have a better way to solve this problem?

sentence.simplified: 运动有很多的好的方面，比如，它对你的身体很好。
sentence.traditional: 運動有很多的好的方面，比如，它對你的身體很好。

sentence.english: Exercise has many great aspects. For example, it is great for your body.

sentence.simplified: 各位旅客，欢迎乘坐本次列车。
sentence.traditional: 各位旅客，歡迎乘坐本次列車。
sentence.pinyin: Gèwèi lǚkè, huānyíng chéngzuò běncì lièchē.
sentence.english: Dear passengers, welcome aboard this train.

sentence.simplified: 如果有时间，我们一起去旅行吧。
sentence.traditional: 如果有時間，我們一起去旅行吧。
sentence.pinyin: Rúguǒ yǒu shíjiān, wǒmen yìqǐ qù lǚxíng ba.
sentence.english: If we have time, let's travel together.

sentence.simplified: 我明年会去世界各地旅游。
sentence.traditional: 我明年會去世界各地旅遊。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ míngnián huì qù shìjiè gèdì lǚyóu.
sentence.english: Next year I'll travel all over the world.

sentence.simplified: 我在日报上看到一条有意思的新闻。
sentence.traditional: 我在日報上看到一條有意思的新聞。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ zài Rìbào shàng kàndào yì tiáo yǒuyìsi de xīnwén.
sentence.english: I saw an interesting piece of news in the daily paper.

sentence.simplified: 日子过得太快了。
sentence.traditional: 日子過得太快了。
sentence.pinyin: Rìzi guò de tài kuài le.
sentence.english: Days go by too fast.

sentence.simplified: 如果你早点说，我早就帮你了。
sentence.traditional: 如果你早點說，我早就幫你了。
sentence.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ zǎodiǎn shuō, wǒ zǎo jiù bāng nǐ le.
sentence.english: If you had said so earlier, I would have helped you long ago.

sentence.simplified: 今天早晨你起得很早。
sentence.traditional: 今天早晨你起得很早。
sentence.pinyin: Jīntiān zǎochén nǐ qǐde hěn zǎo.

sentence.traditional: 這些詞語都不容易。幸好我用Hack Chinese!
sentence.pinyin: Zhèxiē cíyǔ dōu bù róngyì. Xìnghǎo wǒ yòng Hack Chinese!
sentence.english: These words are not easy. Fortunately I use Hack Chinese!

definitions: to be sb's turn to do sth

sentence.simplified: 你该休息一下了。
sentence.traditional: 你該休息一下了。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ gāi xiūxi yíxià le.
sentence.english: You should take a break.

sentence.simplified: 我认为你是故意伤害他的。
sentence.traditional: 我認為你是故意傷害他的。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ rènwéi nǐ shì gùyì shānghài tā de.
sentence.english: I think you hurt him on purpose.

sentence.simplified: 他用身体语言表达了他的情绪。
sentence.traditional: 他用身體語言表達了他的情緒。
sentence.pinyin: Tā yòng shēntǐ yǔyán biǎodá le tāde qíngxù.
sentence.english: He used body language to express his emotions.

sentence.simplified: 他连自己女朋友喜欢吃什么都不知道，说明他不是一个细心的人。
sentence.traditional: 他連自己女朋友喜歡吃什麼都不知道，說明他不是一個細心的人。
sentence.pinyin: Tā lián zìjǐ nǚpéngyou xǐhuān chī shénme dōu bù zhīdào, shuōmíng tā bú shì yí gè xìxīn de rén.
sentence.english: He doesn't even know what his girlfriend likes to eat, this shows that he isn't a very detailed person.

sentence.simplified: 为了提高课堂效率，老师提前发了学习材料。
sentence.traditional: 為了提高課堂效率，老師提前發了學習材料。
sentence.pinyin: Wèile tígāo kètáng xiàolǜ, lǎoshī tíqián fā le xuéxí cáiliào.
sentence.english: To improve class efficiency, the teacher sent out the study materials in advance.

sentence.simplified: 上次是你请客，这次该我了。
sentence.traditional: 上次是你請客，這次該我了。
sentence.pinyin: Shàngcì shì nǐ qǐngkè, zhè cì gāi wǒ le.
sentence.english: You treated last time, so it’s my turn this time.

sentence.simplified: 我请求你原谅我的错误。
sentence.traditional: 我請求你原諒我的錯誤。
sentence.pinyin: wǒ qǐngqiú nǐ yuánliàng wǒ de cuòwù.
sentence.english: I ask for your forgiveness for my mistake.

definitions: as far as sth is concerned

sentence.simplified: 老师在讲今天的作业。
sentence.traditional: 老師在講今天的作業。
sentence.pinyin: Lǎoshī zài jiǎng jīntiān de zuòyè.
sentence.english: The teacher is explaining today’s homework.

sentence.simplified: 你可以用中文讲话吗？
sentence.traditional: 你可以用中文講話嗎？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ yòng Zhōngwén jiǎnghuà ma?
sentence.english: Can you speak in Chinese?

sentence.simplified: 我觉得你应该把护照和车票放在背包里。
sentence.traditional: 我覺得你應該把護照和車票放在背包裡。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ juéde nǐ yīnggāi bǎ hùzhào hé chēpiào fàng zài bèibāo lǐ.
sentence.english: I think you should put your passport and train ticket in your bag.

definitions: literary (rather than colloquial) pronunciation of a Chinese character

sentence.simplified: 他读中文很流利，但是有时候读音还不太准。
sentence.traditional: 他讀中文很流利，但是有時候讀音還不太準。
sentence.pinyin: Tā dú Zhōngwén hěn liúlì, dànshì yǒu shíhou dúyīn hái bú tài zhǔn.
sentence.english: He reads Chinese fluently, but sometimes his pronunciation is still not very accurate.

sentence.simplified: 下雨以后，天气一下子变冷了。
sentence.traditional: 下雨以後，天氣一下子變冷了。
sentence.pinyin: Xiàyǔ yǐhòu, tiānqì yíxiàzi biàn lěng le.
sentence.english: After it rained, the weather suddenly turned cold.

sentence.simplified: 只要努力，你的梦想就有机会变成现实。
sentence.traditional: 只要努力，你的夢想就有機會變成現實。
sentence.pinyin: Zhǐyào nǔlì, nǐde mèngxiǎng jiù yǒu jīhuì biànchéng xiànshí.
sentence.english: As long as you work hard, your dreams have a chance to become reality.

definitions: by (indicates the agent in a passive clause, like 被[bei4])

sentence.simplified: 老师让我们明天带一本中文书来。
sentence.traditional: 老師讓我們明天帶一本中文書來。
sentence.pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen míngtiān dài yì běn Zhōngwén shū lái.
sentence.english: The teacher asked us to bring a Chinese book tomorrow.

sentence.simplified: 我家有一只白色的小猫，非常可爱。
sentence.traditional: 我家有一隻白色的小貓，非常可愛。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu yì zhī báisè de xiǎo māo, fēicháng kě'ài.
sentence.english: There is a little white cat in my home; it’s very cute.

sentence.simplified: 这家商店是卖什么的？
sentence.traditional: 這家商店是賣什麼的？
sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā shāngdiàn shì mài shénme de?
sentence.english: What does this store sell?

sentence.simplified: 他走进房间，把门关上了。
sentence.traditional: 他走進房間，把門關上了。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zǒujìn fángjiān, bǎ mén guānshàng le.
sentence.english: He walked into the room and closed the door.

sentence.simplified: 我每天都会走过这条街。
sentence.traditional: 我每天都會走過這條街。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān dōu huì zǒuguò zhè tiáo jiē.
sentence.english: I walk down this street every day.

sentence.simplified: 小狗看到陌生人就走开了。
sentence.traditional: 小狗看到陌生人就走開了。
sentence.pinyin: Xiǎogǒu kàndào mòshēngrén jiù zǒukāi le.
sentence.english: The little dog walked away when it saw a stranger.

sentence.simplified: 我们的飞机八点起飞。
sentence.traditional: 我們的飛機八點起飛。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen de fēijī bā diǎn qǐfēi.
sentence.english: Our plane takes off at eight o'clock.

definitions: abbr. for 超級市場|超级市场

sentence.simplified: 我要去超市买菜。
sentence.traditional: 我要去超市買菜。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ yào qù chāoshì mǎicài.
sentence.english: I'm going to the supermarket to buy food.

sentence.simplified: 今天气温超过三十度了。
sentence.traditional: 今天氣溫超過三十度了。
sentence.pinyin: Jīntiān qìwēn chāoguò sānshí dù le.
sentence.english: Today the temperature has gone over thirty degrees.

definitions: generic word for peoples or states of south China or south Asia at different historical periods

sentence.simplified: 天气越冷，我越想喝热茶。
sentence.traditional: 天氣越冷，我越想喝熱茶。
sentence.pinyin: Tiānqì yuè lěng, wǒ yuè xiǎng hē rèchá.
sentence.english: The colder the weather gets, the more I want to drink hot tea.

sentence.simplified: 我越来越喜欢这座城市。
sentence.traditional: 我越來越喜歡這座城市。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ yuèláiyuè xǐhuān zhè zuò chéngshì.
sentence.english: I like this city more and more.

sentence.simplified: 请不要把车停在路边。
sentence.traditional: 請不要把車停在路邊。
sentence.pinyin: Qǐng bú yào bǎ chē tíng zài lùbiān.
sentence.english: Please do not park the car by the roadside.

sentence.simplified: 他身边没有家人，只有朋友。
sentence.traditional: 他身邊沒有家人，只有朋友。
sentence.pinyin: Tā shēnbiān méiyǒu jiārén, zhǐyǒu péngyou.
sentence.english: He has no family around him, only friends.

sentence.simplified: 晚上十点以后，路上的车辆少了很多。
sentence.traditional: 晚上十點以後，路上的車輛少了很多。
sentence.pinyin: Wǎnshang shí diǎn yǐhòu, lùshang de chēliàng shǎo le hěn duō.
sentence.english: After ten in the evening, there are much fewer vehicles on the road.

sentence.simplified: 他轻轻地拍了一下我的头。
sentence.traditional: 他輕輕地拍了一下我的頭。
sentence.pinyin: Tā qīngqīng de pāi le yíxià wǒde tóu.
sentence.english: He lightly patted my head.

sentence.simplified: 那辆车好像坏了。
sentence.traditional: 那輛車好像壞了。
sentence.pinyin: Nà liàng chē hǎoxiàng huài le.
sentence.english: That car seems to be broken.

sentence.simplified: 我明天去银行办卡。
sentence.traditional: 我明天去銀行辦卡。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān qù yínháng bàn kǎ.
sentence.english: I will go to the bank tomorrow to get a card.

sentence.simplified: 我们的办公室星期天不开。
sentence.traditional: 我們的辦公室星期天不開。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen de bàngōngshì xīngqītiān bù kāi.
sentence.english: Our office doesn't open on Sunday.

sentence.simplified: 这个问题我们还没有办法。
sentence.traditional: 這個問題我們還沒有辦法。
sentence.pinyin: Zhège wèntí wǒmen hái méiyǒu bànfǎ.
sentence.english: We still don't have a solution to this problem.

sentence.simplified: 要保持社交距离，大家不要靠得太近。
sentence.traditional: 要保持社交距離，大家不要靠得太近。
sentence.pinyin: Yào bǎochí shèjiāo jùlí, dàjiā búyào kào de tài jìn.
sentence.english: Keep social distance, everybody shouldn't stay too close.

sentence.simplified: 这是我送给你的生日礼物。
sentence.traditional: 這是我送給你的生日禮物。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ sònggěi nǐ de shēngrì lǐwù.
sentence.english: This is a birthday present I’m giving to you.

sentence.simplified: 他正准备睡觉，这时有人敲门。
sentence.traditional: 他正準備睡覺，這時有人敲門。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zhèng zhǔnbèi shuìjiào, zhè shí yǒu rén qiāo mén.
sentence.english: He was about to sleep when someone knocked on the door.

sentence.simplified: 这样我们就可以早点回家了。
sentence.traditional: 這樣我們就可以早點回家了。
sentence.pinyin: Zhèyàng wǒmen jiù kěyǐ zǎodiǎn huíjiā le.
sentence.english: This way we can go home earlier.

sentence.simplified: 这本书这么有意思，你一定要看。
sentence.traditional: 這本書這麼有意思，你一定要看。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè běn shū zhème yǒuyìsi, nǐ yídìng yào kàn.
sentence.english: This book is so interesting; you really have to read it.

definitions: classifier for letters, telegrams, phone calls etc

sentence.simplified: 这里的空气不太流通，打开窗户吧。
sentence.traditional: 這裡的空氣不太流通，打開窗戶吧。
sentence.pinyin: Zhèlǐ de kōngqì bú tài liútōng, dǎkāi chuānghu ba.
sentence.english: The air here doesn’t circulate well; open the window.

sentence.simplified: 老师通知我们明天不上课。
sentence.traditional: 老師通知我們明天不上課。
sentence.pinyin: Lǎoshī tōngzhī wǒmen míngtiān bù shàngkè.
sentence.english: The teacher informed us that there is no class tomorrow.

definitions: to pass (a bill or inspection etc)

sentence.simplified: 我们的产品已经通过安全认证。
sentence.traditional: 我們的產品已經通過安全認證。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen de chǎnpǐn yǐjīng tōngguò ānquán rènzhèng.
sentence.english: Our products have already passed the safety certification.

sentence.simplified: 今天是他们结婚十周年。
sentence.traditional: 今天是他們結婚十周年。
sentence.pinyin: Jīntiān shì tāmen jiéhūn shí zhōunián.
sentence.english: Today is their tenth wedding anniversary.

sentence.simplified: 周末你喜欢做什么？
sentence.traditional: 週末你喜歡做什麼？
sentence.pinyin: Zhōumò nǐ xǐhuān zuò shénme?
sentence.english: What do you like to do on weekends?

sentence.simplified: 比赛开始后，大家不能再进入体育场。
sentence.traditional: 比賽開始後，大家不能再進入體育場。
sentence.pinyin: Bǐsài kāishǐ hòu, dàjiā bù néng zài jìnrù tǐyùchǎng.
sentence.english: After the game starts, people can no longer enter the stadium.

sentence.simplified: 我们明天进行中文考试。
sentence.traditional: 我們明天進行中文考試。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen míngtiān jìnxíng Zhōngwén kǎoshì.
sentence.english: We will have a Chinese test tomorrow.

sentence.simplified: 这家小店很受游客欢迎。
sentence.traditional: 這家小店很受遊客歡迎。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎodiàn hěn shòu yóukè huānyíng.
sentence.english: This small shop is very popular with tourists.

sentence.simplified: 因为做运动让我更健康。
sentence.traditional: 因為做運動讓我更健康。
sentence.pinyin: Yīnwèi zuò yùndòng ràng wǒ gèng jiànkāng.
sentence.english: Because doing a workout makes me even healthier.

sentence.simplified: 你可以把文章唸一遍给我听吗？
sentence.traditional: 你可以把文章唸一遍給我聽嗎？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ bǎ wénzhāng niàn yí biàn gěi wǒ tīng ma?
sentence.english: Can you read the article to me once?

sentence.simplified: 这个字我已经学过了。
sentence.traditional: 這個字我已經學過了。
sentence.pinyin: Zhège zì wǒ yǐjīng xué guò le.
sentence.english: I've already studied this word.

definitions: to be able to take care of

sentence.simplified: 你把那本书拿过来给我看看。
sentence.traditional: 你把那本書拿過來給我看看。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ bǎ nà běn shū ná guòlái gěi wǒ kànkan.
sentence.english: Bring that book over and let me have a look.

sentence.simplified: 从我家走到学校，过去要二十分钟，现在只要十分钟。
sentence.traditional: 從我家走到學校，過去要二十分鐘，現在只要十分鐘。
sentence.pinyin: Cóng wǒjiā zǒu dào xuéxiào, guòqù yào èrshí fēnzhōng, xiànzài zhǐ yào shí fēnzhōng.
sentence.english: Walking from my home to school used to take twenty minutes, but now it only takes ten.

definitions: to celebrate the Chinese New Year

sentence.simplified: 小时候，我最期待的就是过年和生日。
sentence.traditional: 小時候，我最期待的就是過年和生日。
sentence.pinyin: Xiǎoshíhou, wǒ zuì qīdài de jiùshì guònián hé shēngrì.
sentence.english: When I was little, what I looked forward to most were the New Year and my birthday.

definitions: classifier for long thin things (rivers, cracks etc), barriers (walls, doors etc), questions (in an exam etc), commands, courses in a meal, steps in a process
(old) administrative division (similar to province in Tang times)

sentence.simplified: 这道菜很好吃，你要不要再来一点？
sentence.traditional: 這道菜很好吃，你要不要再來一點？
sentence.pinyin: Zhè dào cài hěn hǎochī, nǐ yào bu yào zài lái yìdiǎn?
sentence.english: This dish is very tasty; would you like some more?

sentence.simplified: 我明白你的道理，但是我有我的立场。
sentence.traditional: 我明白你的道理，但是我有我的立場。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ míngbái nǐ de dàolǐ, dànshì wǒ yǒu wǒ de lìchǎng.
sentence.english: I understand your point of view, but I have my own stance.

sentence.simplified: 这条道路正在修理，开车要特别小心。
sentence.traditional: 這條道路正在修理，開車要特別小心。
sentence.pinyin: Zhè tiáo dàolù zhèngzài xiūlǐ, kāichē yào tèbié xiǎoxīn.
sentence.english: This road is under repair, so you must be especially careful when driving.

sentence.simplified: 老师让我们自己选小组长。
sentence.traditional: 老師讓我們自己選小組長。
sentence.pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen zìjǐ xuǎn xiǎozǔzhǎng.
sentence.english: The teacher let us choose our own group leader.

sentence.simplified: 他坐在窗边，看外面的风景。
sentence.traditional: 他坐在窗邊，看外面的風景。
sentence.pinyin: Tā zuò zài chuāngbiān, kàn wàimiàn de fēngjǐng.
sentence.english: He sits by the window, looking at the view outside.

sentence.simplified: 我那时每天都写日记。
sentence.traditional: 我那時每天都寫日記。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ nàshí měitiān dōu xiě rìjì.
sentence.english: At that time I wrote in my diary every day.

sentence.simplified: 小时候我们没有手机，那时候都写信联系朋友。
sentence.traditional: 小時候我們沒有手機，那時候都寫信聯繫朋友。
sentence.pinyin: Xiǎoshíhou wǒmen méiyǒu shǒujī, nà shíhou dōu xiěxìn liánxì péngyou.
sentence.english: When we were little, we didn’t have mobile phones; back then we all wrote letters to keep in touch with friends.

sentence.simplified: 他那样做，是为了帮助你。
sentence.traditional: 他那樣做，是為了幫助你。
sentence.pinyin: Tā nàyàng zuò, shì wèile bāngzhù nǐ.
sentence.english: He did it that way in order to help you.

sentence.simplified: 别那么紧张，考试很简单。
sentence.traditional: 別那麼緊張，考試很簡單。
sentence.pinyin: Bié nàme jǐnzhāng, kǎoshì hěn jiǎndān.
sentence.english: Don’t be so nervous; the exam is very easy.

sentence.simplified: 只有一部分学生来了。
sentence.traditional: 只有一部分學生來了。
sentence.pinyin: Zhǐyǒu yí bùfen xuéshēng lái le.
sentence.english: Only a portion of the students came.

sentence.simplified: 你想跟谁一起去酒吧喝酒？
sentence.traditional: 你想跟誰一起去酒吧喝酒？
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng gēn shéi yìqǐ qù jiǔbā hējiǔ?
sentence.english: Who do you want to go to the bar with?

sentence.simplified: 我订好酒店了。
sentence.traditional: 我訂好酒店了。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ dìnghǎo jiǔdiàn le.
sentence.english: I booked the hotel.

sentence.simplified: 导演要求演员重新再演一遍。
sentence.traditional: 導演要求演員重新再演一遍。
sentence.pinyin: Dǎoyǎn yāoqiú yǎnyuán chóngxīn zài yǎn yí biàn.
sentence.english: The director requested the actor to perform once more.

sentence.simplified: 他把话重复说了很多遍。
sentence.traditional: 他把話重複說了很多遍。
sentence.pinyin: Tā bǎ huà chóngfù shuōle hěn duō biàn.
sentence.english: He repeated himself many times.

sentence.simplified: 我们应该重视学习中文的机会。
sentence.traditional: 我們應該重視學習中文的機會。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi zhòngshì xuéxí Zhōngwén de jīhuì.
sentence.english: We should value the chance to study Chinese.

sentence.simplified: 学习时要抓住重点，不要什么都想学。
sentence.traditional: 學習時要抓住重點，不要什麼都想學。
sentence.pinyin: Xuéxí shí yào zhuāzhù zhòngdiǎn, búyào shénme dōu xiǎng xué.
sentence.english: When studying, you should grasp the main points and not try to learn everything at once.

sentence.simplified: 银行什么时候关门？
sentence.traditional: 銀行什麼時候關門？
sentence.pinyin: Yínháng shénme shíhou guānmén?
sentence.english: What time does the bank close?

sentence.simplified: 我用银行卡付钱。
sentence.traditional: 我用銀行卡付錢。
sentence.pinyin: Wǒ yòng yínhángkǎ fù qián.
sentence.english: I pay with a bank card.

sentence.simplified: 他的手表很旧了，但是还可以用。
sentence.traditional: 他的手錶很舊了，但是還可以用。
sentence.pinyin: Tā de shǒubiǎo hěn jiù le, dànshì hái kěyǐ yòng.
sentence.english: His watch is very old, but it still works.

sentence.simplified: 她有长长的头发、大大的眼睛。
sentence.traditional: 她有長長的頭髮、大大的眼睛。
sentence.pinyin: Tā yǒu chángcháng de tóufa, dàdà de yǎnjīng.
sentence.english: She has long hair and big eyes.

sentence.simplified: 你又长高了。
sentence.traditional: 你又長高了。
sentence.pinyin: Nǐ yòu zhǎnggāo le.
sentence.english: You've grown taller again!

sentence.simplified: 孩子们很快就长大了。
sentence.traditional: 孩子們很快就長大了。
sentence.pinyin: Háizimen hěn kuài jiù zhǎngdà le.

sentence.simplified: 我已经拿到你的电子邮件地址了。
